nl_query: Show all question papers with total marks exceeding 100.
failed_sql:
SELECT qp.id, qp.title, SUM(em.marks_awarded) AS total_evaluation_marks
FROM   question_paper qp
JOIN   evaluation_attempt ea ON ea.script_id = s.id AND ea.is_active = TRUE
JOIN   evaluation_marks em ON em.attempt_id = ea.id
JOIN   script_assignment sa ON sa.id = ea.assignment_id AND sa.is_active = TRUE
JOIN   answer_script s ON s.id = sa.script_id
WHERE  qp.total_marks > 100
GROUP BY qp.id, qp.title
error:
Validation failed (cost): EXPLAIN revealed a SQL error: missing FROM-clause entry for table "ea"
LINE 3: JOIN   script_assignment sa ON sa.id = ea.assignment_id AND ...
                                               ^
